name: SOL Trial-00095 Transfer Feasibility
scope: Research Lab offline strategy transfer only. Replay frozen BTC trial-00095 sweep/reclaim parameters on the audited SOLUSDT dataset, then compare BTC+ETH baseline portfolio against BTC+ETH+SOL through the offline portfolio gate. No runtime, shadow, PAPER, LIVE, or threshold changes.
edge_rationale: BTC trial-00095 sweep/reclaim transferred strongly to ETH. SOL is liquid and volatile enough to plausibly share the same stop-run and reclaim microstructure, but transfer must be proven with frozen parameters before any SOL monitoring or runtime design.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: The tested mechanism is the existing sweep/reclaim edge: aggressive stop-run below/above visible structure followed by reclaim. The milestone tests whether this existing mechanism transfers to SOLUSDT, not whether SOL needs custom parameters.
required_data: Audited BTC trial-00095 source replay DB
baseline_reference: BTC+ETH full pipeline replay baseline: 696 approved trades, ER 1.955, PF 3.60, max DD 13.74R
frozen_assumptions: Only the research symbol changes to SOLUSDT for standalone transfer.
SOL source dataset is read-only; temporary replay DB receives compatibility tables and derived 1h candles.
BTC+ETH baseline is the audited full-pipeline portfolio replay.
Portfolio gate remains offline and cannot approve runtime behavior.
expected_observation: If the edge transfers, SOL standalone should pass transfer gates and BTC+ETH+SOL should preserve decision-grade portfolio quality while increasing opportunity count without excessive drawdown.

kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any core/orchestrator/settings/execution/storage production change invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.sol_tuning: Any SOL-specific threshold tuning invalidates the transfer claim.
kill_criteria.source_db_mutation: Mutating audited BTC/ETH/SOL source datasets invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.standalone_fail: SOL standalone transfer fails if any hard transfer gate fails.
kill_criteria.portfolio_fail: BTC+ETH+SOL portfolio fails if predeclared portfolio gates fail.

failure_modes: SOL has more noise and sweep/reclaim does not retain quality.
SOL passes standalone but portfolio caps veto most SOL signals.
SOL signals overlap with BTC/ETH drawdown periods and increase portfolio DD.
Transfer quality depends on one period or one regime.
Source replay compatibility differs between SOL and ETH.
out_of_scope: Changing BTC or ETH portfolio runtime plans
Changing core, orchestrator, settings, execution, risk, or production storage
author: Codex
